name: financial_services_satellite_derived_kestrel_lib_eq
premise: A prime brokerage desk discovered that margin calls were computed against stale collateral marks during a fast market. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services satellite derived kestrel lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make liberty feel morally loud today, while equality is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Sana Mensah
agents.identity: I am Sana Mensah, the accountable executive on this bridge in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Reed
agents.identity: I am Gideon Reed, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if liberty advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for equality.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Sana Mensah must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Sana Mensah do?
